name: Clipboard History
description: Shows recent clipboard content and text currently on the clipboard
author: AgentOS

steps.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $clip = [System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::GetText(); if ($clip) { Write-Output "Current clipboard content:"; Write-Output $clip } else { Write-Output "Clipboard is empty or contains non-text data" }
